data.description: Dassault Systèmes revealed trading of in-house shares, with significant figures involved.

data.title: Readymode introduces Autopilot's Smart Mode, enhancing dialing platform with carrier-level intelligence - Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 18, 2026, Readymode, a prominent outbound customer engagement solutions provider, unveiled the introduction of Autopilot's latest innovation - Smart Mode. This upgraded feature on their dialing platform incorporates carrier-level intelligence, marking a significant advancement. The new Smart Mode is set to enhance the dialing capabilities significantly, with a notable impact on improving outbound customer engagement.

data.title: $250M acquisition of Sequence by Polygon (MATIC) Labs to enhance enterprise stablecoin payments through smart wallet tech.
data.description: After acquiring Sequence smart wallet technology for $250 million, Polygon (MATIC) Labs has successfully integrated it into their system. This move is part of their strategy to address the challenges faced in enterprise wallet infrastructure, particularly in facilitating stablecoin payments. The integration aims to streamline and improve the process of stablecoin transactions within the ecosystem.

data.title: Forêt Domaniale Wind Farm approved in Quebec with 30 wind turbines, 185.6 MW capacity, in 4 municipalities.
data.description: In Montmagny, Quebec, EDF solutions électriques and Alliance de l’énergie de l’Est have expressed their excitement following the government's approval of the construction of the Forêt Domaniale wind farm. This project will consist of 30 wind turbines with a combined installed capacity of 185.6 MW. Situated in forested regions, the wind farm will be established across the areas of Cap-Saint-Ignace, Montmagny, Notre-Dame-du-Rosaire, and Sainte-Apolline-de-Patton in the Montma municipality.

data.title: Great American Media launches "40 Days of Scripture & Film" for Lent featuring faith-based movies like God's Not Dead and original movie "Blessings in Disguise." Includes Season 1 finale "Crossroad Springs" and Season 3 return of "When Hope Calls."
data.description: In a recent programming event, Great American Media unveiled the world premiere of the original movie "Blessings in Disguise," featuring Shae Robins and Casey Elliott. The event also included the Season 1 finale of "Crossroad Springs" and marked the return of Season 3 of "When Hope Calls." This announcement was made on Feb. 18, 2026, in New York. The company introduced a special event titled "40 Days of...," bringing together these exciting new releases and continuing the captivating storylines of the mentioned series.

data.title: Business owner Jim Johnson discusses benefits of ergonomic worktables in HelloNation. Reducing worker fatigue and back pain.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in Huntsville, Alabama, a recent article from HelloNation highlighted the prevalence of back pain, sore shoulders, and fatigue among workers. The piece, which featured Jim Johnson from Worktables.com, discussed the benefits of ergonomic adjustable height worktables in alleviating these issues. The article explored the reasons for work-related discomfort and how such worktables can help mitigate these concerns. Ergonomic adjustable height worktables have shown promise in reducing daily discomfort for workers, offering a potential solution to the physical strains faced by many individuals in their work environments.

data.title: Goldman Sachs CEO has minimal Bitcoin holdings, supports clarity on crypto legislation by Treasury Secretary Bessent.
data.description: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon expressed support for Treasury Secretary Bessent, who criticized companies such as Coinbase for preferring no crypto legislation over a flawed bill.

data.title: Microsoft and CrowdStrike partner to offer Falcon platform on Microsoft Marketplace for easy procurement.
data.description: In a joint announcement, CrowdStrike (CRWD) and Microsoft Corp. (MSFT) have disclosed an extension of their strategic partnership. This collaboration enables businesses of various sizes to procure the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform through Microsoft Marketplace by utilizing their current Microsoft Azure Consumption Commitment. The integration with Marketplace simplifies the purchasing and billing processes, facilitating quicker deployment of Falcon’s advanced, AI-based security solutions for endpoints and cloud services.

data.title: Sotheby's International Realty tops in profitability for 2025, with leadership in overhead discipline. Independent brokerages and LeadingRE follow as top three. Study analyzed 11 national real estate brands.
data.description: A recent study revealed that effective leadership in the real estate industry is determined more by overhead discipline than gross margins. According to the 2025 median performance results from AccountTECH involving 11 national real estate brokerage brands, independent brokerages and LeadingRE ranked among the top three. The study, released today in Boston, highlights the importance of strategic cost management in achieving leadership positions in the industry.

data.title: Members Development Company rebrands as Circuit, a credit union innovation platform after 20+ years. DENVER, Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: After over two decades of promoting innovation and teamwork, Members Development Company, LLC introduces Circuit, its fresh brand image, to showcase its transformation into a unified innovation platform for credit unions. The unveiling took place in Denver on February 18, 2026.

data.title: Las Vegas to host Drink Festival on Sept. 24-27. Mixologists & chefs unite for exclusive experiences. MGM to host at Bellagio, ARIA, Cosmopolitan, and Park MGM.
data.description: An upcoming festival, organized by MGM Resorts International, is set to unite distinguished beverage and culinary specialists for unique events and experiences. Taking place in Las Vegas on February 18, 2026, this inaugural event will be hosted at Bellagio, ARIA, The Cosmopolitan of Las Vegas, and Park MGM.

data.title: Semperis listed on CRN's 2026 Security 100; Eric Purcell named 2026 CRN Channel Chief; Cyber resilience company based in Hoboken, N.J.
data.description: Eric Purcell, the Senior Vice President of Global Partner Sales and Alliances at Semperis, has been recognized as a 2026 CRN Channel Chief. On February 18, 2026, Semperis, a company specializing in identity-driven cyber resilience and crisis management, revealed this achievement. They have secured a spot on the CRN® 2026 Security list.

data.title: Vortex Companies renames polyurethane grout line to Maverick Grouts, nation's top trenchless solutions provider.
data.description: On February 18, 2026, in Houston, Vortex Companies (Vortex), a top provider of trenchless infrastructure solutions, revealed the rebranding of its polyurethane foam grout products as Maverick Grouts. This move signifies a revamped and improved line under the new name, enhancing its offerings in the market.

data.title: Carrot boosts parenting benefits, now offers on-demand pediatric telemedicine through Blueberry Pediatrics for families with kids under 12.
data.description: In West Des Moines, Iowa, on February 18, 2026, Carrot disclosed an enhancement in its parenting perks by including on-demand pediatric telemedicine services from Blueberry Pediatrics. This extended feature is now accessible for families with kids under 12 years old.

data.title: Golden 1 Credit Union awards $1.5 million to 55 nonprofits in Sacramento and San Joaquin Valleys for community impact.
data.description: Every two years, a program is launched to provide support to nonprofits in California that focus on education, entrepreneurship, and community impact. Golden 1 Credit Union recently announced that they have awarded grants to 55 nonprofit organizations in the Sacramento and San Joaquin Valleys. The total amount granted to these organizations over a two-year period is $1.5 million. These nonprofits play a crucial role in supporting various initiatives that aim to bring positive changes in the community.

data.title: Lifespan Vision Ventures co-leads Sift Biosciences' oversubscribed $3.7M pre-seed financing with Freeflow Ventures in Norwalk.
data.description: Lifespan Vision Ventures, a investment company specializing in therapeutics that enhance human healthspan, revealed on February 18, 2026 that it has co-led the oversubscribed Pre-Seed funding of $3.7 million for Sift Biosciences, in collaboration with Freeflow Ventures.

data.title: Inventor from Dallas, Texas creates a new Shower Shelf accessory for sink tasks in the shower - Feb. 18, 2026.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 18, 2026, an inventor from Dallas, Texas shared the inspiration behind the creation of the SHOWER SHELF. The inventor mentioned the idea stemmed from a desire to simplify daily grooming routines typically carried out at the sink but now achievable in the shower. This new design aims to save time and streamline tasks, offering convenience to users. The inventive product seeks to enhance efficiency and diminish...

data.title: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. unveils Quantum Intelligent Interconnected Fault-Tolerant Consensus Algorithm, integrating quantum computing tech.
data.description: Based in Shenzhen, China, on February 18, 2026, MicroCloud Hologram Inc. (NASDAQ: HOLO) revealed plans for a groundbreaking quantum intelligent interconnected fault-tolerant consensus algorithm. This innovative technology incorporates quantum computing, marking a significant step forward in the field.
